message: Build keeps timing out on CI since last merge. Logs are noisy; suspect test suite regression.
User reports 'Cannot read property x of undefined' on Settings page; browser Chrome 123; OS Windows 11.
Minor typo in About dialog: 'copryight' should be 'copyright'.
Production API returns 500s after deploy at 14:32 UTC. AFFECTING PAYMENTS!!! Stack trace: Error: NullReferenceException at PaymentService.cs:42 -> Controller.cs:88 ...
README link to CONTRIBUTING returns 404; expected /docs/contributing.md but points to /CONTRIBUTING.
